texto: But as she looked over toward the doors, her breath caught. Her eyes locked on the deep blue ones of a man just entering. He was tall and muscular, his hair blonde and well cut. And he was dressed impeccably in a dark grey suit and a deep blue tie. But it was his eyes that drew her focus and made her heart beat faster.
explicacao: Citação de M. Tyler sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “But as she looked over toward the doors, her breath caught. Her eyes locked on the deep blue ones…” articula amor, adam, attraction em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e attraction.
